meaning: n.雇主一年一次款待雇工的宴席,<俚>快乐的宴会
examples: They then shouted "Beano!" and were awarded a prize.
On he capers, knock-kneed, curly-shoed, spindly-legged in awful black tights, like something out of the Beano!
It will be replaced in the next few months with a new website and will be known simply as Beano.com.
In the UK, two new comics have emerged to join long established titles such as 2000AD, The Beano and Commando.
